roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CALENDAR RE VACATE SENTENCE & RE-SENTENCE FILED

/CAL:PAROLEE'S MOTION TO VACATE SENTENCE OF 2-25-15 PURSUANT TO PC3000,08//MO GRTD/X:PAROLEE HAS $170K WARRANT OUT OF BERKELEY FOR PC530,5 VIOLATION//X:NEW SENTENCE IMPOSED,/PAJ:20 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 20DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 02-18-2015 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE FROM ALAMEDAY CNTY JAIL ON HIS PC530,5 CASE, COMPLETE TREATMENT AS PAROLE DEEMS APPROPRIATE ONCE HE FINISHES ADDRESSING HIS CASE IN ALAMEDA CNTY,  AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ: 50 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 8 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLEE MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM, PAROLEE MUST COMPLETE 60DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360, HEWILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ON MARCH 5, 2015, ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFYTREATMENT,/X:TRANSPORTATION ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/X:VIOLATIONS #2 AND 3ARE DISMISSED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 2-18-2015 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
